title: Kathleen
writer: Mary C. McCall Jr., Kay Van Riper
actors: Shirley Temple, Herbert Marshall, Laraine Day
plot: Kathleen is a 12 year old who lives in a big house with a nanny, a butler, maids, no mother and a father who is working most of the time. She dreams of a family with a mother, father and her, and tells everyone that she has such a...
